description: Use this API to return the number of array entries required to accommodate the data to be returned by the remaining members of the VSC dc line data family. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.0. ierr, brnchs = avscdccount(sid, ties, flag)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the bus subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: ties
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem vsc dc lines to include (ignored if sid is negative). (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem vsc dc lines to include. (input; 1 by default).

return_values.name: brnchs
return_values.description: Number of array entries required for the subsystem indicated by sid that meet the editing criteria indicated by ties and flag. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all buses in the working case.
valid bus subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

ties.description: for interior subsystem VSC dc lines only.
for subsystem tie VSC dc lines only.
for both interior subsystem VSC dc lines and tie VSC dc lines.

flag.description: for only in-service VSC dc lines with one or both converters in-service.
for only in-service VSC dc lines with both converters in-service.

error_codes.description: Working case is empty; BRNCHS returned as 0.
Invalid SID value; BRNCHS returned as 0.
Invalid TIES value; BRNCHS returned as 0.
Invalid FLAG value; BRNCHS returned as 0.
